title: Beilschmiedia obscura
taxonomy: Beilschmiedia obscura is classified as a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It belongs to the genus Beilschmiedia, which is a group of evergreen trees commonly found in tropical regions. Within the Lauraceae family, Beilschmiedia obscura is further classified as a member of the Lauroide clade. This plant is native to the Pacific Islands, where it grows as a small to medium-sized tree. Beilschmiedia obscura is an important part of its native ecosystem, providing habitat and food for various animals and insects.
